name: National Weather Service
notes: Official NWS active weather/hazard alerts for the query point. National point-query feed; always selected. Future city/state alert feeds register here scoped to place:/state: ids.

name: USGS Earthquake Hazards Program
notes: Official USGS GeoJSON earthquake events near the query point. Adapter queries recent M3.5+ events within 300 km.

name: NASA Earth Observatory Natural Event Tracker
notes: NASA EONET open natural events near the query point, including wildfires, severe storms, volcanoes, landslides, and dust/haze.

name: NOAA National Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official NTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering California coastal users.

name: NOAA National Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official NTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering Oregon coastal users.

name: NOAA National Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official NTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering Washington coastal users.

name: NOAA National Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official NTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering Alaska coastal users.

name: NOAA Pacific Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official PTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering Hawaii users.

name: NOAA Pacific Tsunami Warning Center
notes: Official PTWC CAP feed for tsunami warning/advisory/watch/threat messages covering Puerto Rico users.

name: NYPD Complaint Data Current Year
refresh: updated by NYC Open Data during the current reporting year
notes: Official NYC Open Data crime complaint records. Not a live 911 feed; adapter limits to recent reports near the query point.

name: LAPD Crime Data (2020–present)
refresh: FROZEN — latest record 2024-12-30 (LAPD RMS migration); not currently updated
notes: Official LAPD crime reports. DISABLED: the dataset is frozen at 2024-12-30 (LAPD records-system migration), so a recent-window query returns nothing. Re-enable when LAPD publishes a current feed (and verify whether a location_1 point column exists for server-side within_box). Fields verified: date_occ/crm_cd_desc/area_name/lat/lon (no point col).

name: Chicago Crimes (one year prior to present)
refresh: updated daily by Chicago PD on the Chicago Data Portal (~7-day lag)
notes: Official Chicago crime reports (rolling one-year window). Historical reports, not a live feed. Has a Point `location` column for server-side within_box filtering. Upstream field `_primary_decsription` is misspelled — used verbatim.

name: NYC Emergency Management Notifications
refresh: STALE — latest record 2025-09-15 on NYC Open Data; export lags months
notes: Official Notify NYC / NYCEM emergency notifications. DISABLED: the Open Data export is stale (latest 2025-09-15), so a recent-window query returns nothing. City-wide feed with no per-message coordinates (NYC-scoped, no spatial filter). includeCategories matches the real notificationtype values to drop routine notices. Re-enable when the export resumes (or switch to a live Notify NYC feed).

name: CAL FIRE Active Incidents
notes: Official CAL FIRE active wildfire incidents. Adapter keeps active incidents within ~300 km of the query point. Covers California (LA hub).

name: EPA AirNow Air Quality
notes: EPA AirNow current AQI near the point. Emits an alert only when the AQI category is Unhealthy-for-Sensitive-Groups or worse. Requires AIRNOW_API_KEY — keep disabled until the key is set, then flip enabled to true.

name: FEMA Disaster Declarations
notes: Recent FEMA disaster/emergency declarations designated for LA County (state of emergency signal). Independent of the unscoped NewsTicker FEMA feed.

name: FEMA Disaster Declarations
notes: Recent FEMA disaster/emergency declarations designated for Cook County (Chicago).

name: FEMA Disaster Declarations
notes: Recent FEMA disaster/emergency declarations for New York State (NYC fallback — borough county FIPS vary; state scope avoids missing them).
